Posts

  • Aug 27, 2018

    std::function - std::bind - std::placeholders

    Showing Status — Getting Commands

    One of the things I will want to do is display the simulated PDP8 status on the wonderful PiDP8 front pannel, and communicate front panel switch events to the simulated PDP8.

  • Aug 24, 2018

    Template Programming

    I have described early generic programming in Cfront, which used templates as a way to introduce type-safe generic typing to the language, as gruesome. There were probably several reasons, but the one I remember best was due to Cfront being a pre-processor.

  • Aug 20, 2018

    Why C++?

    I have been programming in C++ since the beginning in the 1990s when the Cfront compiler was first released. The history of C++ has not really been smooth. The first implementations of generic programming with Cfront were particularly gruesome.
